title: MANUAL DE FUNCȚIONARE
subtitle: TEHNOLOGIE DE ÎNMULȚIRE CU SECVENȚE ECOLOGICE LA SCORUȘUL NEGRU (ARONIA MELANOCARPA)
description: A manual for ecological in vitro propagation technology of black chokeberry (Aronia melanocarpa), providing detailed protocols for laboratory setup, culture media composition, and micropropagation workflows. It also addresses ecological nutrient and phytosanitary strategies, acclimatization processes, and precision monitoring systems implemented in a rural development project in Romania.
